genhaz 0.1.0

Mixture Weibull GH model quantities

Source: R/mixture_weibull.R
mixWeib.Rd

Evaluates the survival function ("S"), cumulative hazard ("H"), or hazard ("h") of a two-component mixture Weibull GH model.

Usage

mixWeib(res = "S", t, p, lambda1, lambda2, gamma1, gamma2, X, beta1, beta2)

Arguments

res

Character: "S", "H", or "h".

t

Numeric vector of time points.

p

Mixture proportion (weight of the first component), in (0, 1).

lambda1, lambda2

Scale parameters of the two Weibull components.

gamma1, gamma2

Shape parameters of the two Weibull components.

X

Numeric covariate value (scalar or vector).

beta1

AFT-type covariate coefficient.

beta2

PH-type covariate coefficient.

Value

Numeric vector of the requested quantity.

Examples

t <- seq(0.01, 5, length.out = 100)
mixWeib("h", t, p = 0.8, lambda1 = 0.1, lambda2 = 0.1,
        gamma1 = 3, gamma2 = 1.6, X = 0, beta1 = 0.5, beta2 = 0.5)
#>   [1] 0.002042962 0.006810689 0.011477747 0.016906152 0.023292221 0.030723090
#>   [7] 0.039247867 0.048898049 0.059695399 0.071655520 0.084789635 0.099105529
#>  [13] 0.114608035 0.131299285 0.149178801 0.168243492 0.188487585 0.209902504
#>  [19] 0.232476702 0.256195468 0.281040689 0.306990577 0.334019366 0.362096962
#>  [25] 0.391188552 0.421254172 0.452248213 0.484118886 0.516807619 0.550248389
#>  [31] 0.584367003 0.619080295 0.654295267 0.689908163 0.725803479 0.761852935
#>  [37] 0.797914407 0.833830852 0.869429266 0.904519707 0.938894455 0.972327381
#>  [43] 1.004573624 1.035369696 1.064434153 1.091468997 1.116161993 1.138190087
#>  [49] 1.157224122 1.172935021 1.185001573 1.193119849 1.197014223 1.196449746
#>  [55] 1.191245478 1.181288170 1.166545420 1.147077289 1.123045212 1.094717006
#>  [61] 1.062466939 1.026770099 0.988190754 0.947364972 0.904978378 0.861740504
#>  [67] 0.818357579 0.775505829 0.733807280 0.693809755 0.655972230 0.620656152
#>  [73] 0.588122671 0.558535246 0.531966690 0.508409506 0.487788301 0.469973168
#>  [79] 0.454793053 0.442048368 0.431522326 0.422990688 0.416229782 0.411022798
#>  [85] 0.407164478 0.404464352 0.402748737 0.401861702 0.401665221 0.402038701
#>  [91] 0.402878048 0.404094449 0.405612947 0.407370953 0.409316739 0.411407980
#>  [97] 0.413610389 0.415896459 0.418244339 0.420636837
